political.s: FEC: $59K PAC donations; 94% to Republican, 6% to Democratic committees.

charity.focus: Workforce readiness, small business, financial capability, community development, affordable housing

wiki.industry: financial sector, financial services, economics of banking
wiki.extract: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is an American multinational banking institution headquartered in New York City and incorporated in Delaware. It is the largest bank in the United States, and the world's largest bank by market capitalization as of 2026. As the largest of the Big Four banks in America, the firm is considered systemically important by the Financial Stability Board. Its size and scale have often led to enhanced regulatory oversight as well as the development of an internal "Fortress Balance Sheet".

sampleRecords.part_of_body: Body systems and other part(s) of body
sampleRecords.nature: Burns and toxic effects (including smoke inhalation)
sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by vehicle in nonroadway area  unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: A vehicle crashed into a building where a employee was working in an office. The employee suffered burns to an ear, the head, and the back, as well as smoke inhalation. The employee was hospitalized.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was walking in the parking lot when she tripped over a speed bump and fell, resulting in a fractured knee.
